page: UpCloud 80xCPU-512GB is a general-purpose server powered by an AMD EPYC 7543 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 80 physical cores and 80 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration, running at a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing 6.4 GB of memory per core, and includes 2048 GB of local SSD storage. Virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core tests and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. It also achieves top-tier results in PassMark CPU encryption and physics tests. Single-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng single-core tests, while Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores fall within the average range. Memory write bandwidth for large blocks is strong, though large-block read-only memory bandwidth remains average.

This hardware configuration is highly suited for multi-threaded workloads, database operations, and software compilation, as evidenced by strong performance in PassMark database operations and Clang compilation tests. However, it exhibits limitations in specific tasks, such as text generation using medium-sized 7B LLM models, which registers in the bottom 25%. The server offers a balanced resource density for large-scale general-purpose applications, enterprise databases, and parallel processing tasks without the cost overhead of dedicated GPU hardware.
description: The UpCloud 80xCPU-512GB is a general-purpose server configured with 80 vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, running on an AMD EPYC 7543 processor with x86_64 architecture. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 2048 GB of local SSD storage and a single thread per core configuration. Benchmark data highlights top-tier multi-core CPU performance, particularly in multi-threaded decompression and PassMark physics and encryption tests. Single-core processing and memory write bandwidth are also strong, though large-block read-only memory bandwidth and text generation for medium LLM models are average to weak. This server is optimized for high-density multi-threaded workloads, software compilation, and database operations that require substantial memory and parallel processing capabilities without dedicated GPU acceleration.
og_description: UpCloud 80xCPU-512GB is a general-purpose server featuring 80 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2048 GB SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: UpCloud 80xCPU-512GB is an x86_64 server with 80 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2048 GB SSD storage, optimized for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity x86_64 server featuring eighty physical cores, half a terabyte of memory, and integrated local SSD storage.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 7543 processor with 80 vCPUs and 80 physical cores
Equipped with 512 GB of RAM and 2048 GB of local SSD storage
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and multi-threaded decompression
Strong performance in database operations and software compilation
Best suited for enterprise databases, parallel processing, and multi-threaded workloads
